summary: Backend + WS testing pass 1 for Bubble chat MVP. 20/20 pytest tests PASSED (100%). All REST endpoints (health, /me, logout, users/search, chats CRUD with 1-1 reuse, group chat, messages text+image, empty-rejection, foreign-chat 404, ordering, read/unread), WebSocket auth-close (4401), real-time message + typing broadcast, and presence online/offline all working. MongoDB _id is properly excluded from every JSON response we inspected. Login screen renders with correct testID.

minor.issue: Dead endpoint: handler calls auth_me_impl(user=None) which just `pass`, so it always returns null. It is not used by frontend (frontend uses /api/me) but should be removed or wired up to avoid confusion.

action_items: Remove or implement the stub `GET /api/auth/me` handler in server.py (lines 161-167) — currently returns null.

Consider adding `client_id` to the `_serialize_msg` return + a unique index on (chat_id, client_id) to make offline-queue retries truly idempotent (currently client_id is stored but duplicates are not deduped).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has two overlapping 'who am I' endpoints — /api/auth/me (broken, returns null) and /api/me (works). Delete the broken one.

Offline queue support is only partial: `client_id` is persisted on messages but there is no upsert-by-client_id logic, so a client that retries a queued message after network recovery will create duplicates.

Presence broadcast on connect/disconnect only reaches users currently in `manager.connections`; that is expected for real-time, but the DB `online` flag can get stuck true if the pod restarts abruptly (no startup reset). Consider clearing `users.online=false` on server startup.
CORS is `allow_origins=['*']` combined with `allow_credentials=True` — browsers ignore credentialed requests with a wildcard; harmless here since auth uses Bearer, but worth tightening.
seed_data_creation: Three test users (TEST_alice/bob/carol) with sessions inserted directly into MongoDB via conftest session fixture; teardown removes users, sessions, chats and messages tagged with those user_ids.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://chat-kotlin-react.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). WebSocket at wss://.../api/ws?token=<session_token>. Auth cannot be tested end-to-end because it requires Emergent Google OAuth; seed users/sessions directly in Mongo (see conftest.py `_mk_user`). Session tokens must have tz-aware `expires_at`. Full regression: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_bubble_chat.py -v`.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs blocking MVP. Only cosmetic dead endpoint (/api/auth/me) and partial offline-queue idempotency noted.
